stdout.text: myax_workspace_grep        grep workspace for a pattern
deploy_coey_worker           deploy my worker to coey.dev
pantry run slugify --input '{"title":"My First Pantry Recipe!"}'
# not a sandbox; running fetched code is the caller's decision
The pantry demo is a recorded run showing the exact steps
that any harness can take to discover, fetch, and run recipes.
pantry is the durable, harness-agnostic shelf for recipes.
Any harness can fetch the same saved source.
The caller reviews the artifact and chooses its own execution authority.
